name: I hurt my shoulder lifting at work but have an old injury there, will they deny my claim?
description: Yes, if work aggravated it—get medical proof.[2]

mainEntity.name: I hurt my shoulder lifting at work but have an old injury there, will they deny my claim?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, if work aggravated it—get medical proof.[2]
acceptedAnswer.description: Pre-existing conditions can be covered if work aggravated them; explain details to your doctor for Form 123.[1][2] Insurers may dispute, but aggravation qualifies.[2] Key factors: Document work causation; get strong medical opinion.[2] Avoid downplaying history; seek lawyer if contested.[2] Utah comp covers work-related worsenings.[2]
